weather.summary: Saturday: 12°C, scattered clouds. Sunday: 12°C, clear sky

metadata.greeting: This weekend in Hackney looks perfect for getting out and about! There's a wonderful mix of free outdoor activities and stimulating indoor options, from museum explorations to theatrical adventures. Let's make the most of the lovely weather and explore!

activities.title: Library Club at the Hackney Showroom
activities.description: A relaxed club with a reading corner and diverse book selection. Drop-in.
activities.whyItWorks: Offers a calm environment for toddlers to explore books and stories.

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Hackney Downs, then short walk.
transport.tip: Check term times before you go!

activities.title: Biodiversity Playground
activities.description: A small, beautifully designed wooden playground with a pond theme.
activities.whyItWorks: Designed specifically for toddlers with accessible play equipment.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Stratford, then walk through the park.
transport.tip: Combine with a walk around the Olympic Park.

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.description: Interactive galleries (Design, Imagine, Play) with a collection of childhood-related objects and toys. 'Mini Museum' area for under 2s.
activities.whyItWorks: Designed with children in mind, offering hands-on exhibits and sensory experiences.

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Bethnal Green, 2 min walk.
transport.tip: Can get crowded, avoid peak hours.

activities.title: Mini Morris: Birthday Band
activities.description: Create a colourful tambourine.
activities.whyItWorks: Creative and hands-on activity suitable for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Walthamstow Central, then short walk.
transport.tip: Check the specific times on the website.

activities.title: Family Day: Cosy Critters
activities.description: Weave a cozy bed for a dragon, songbird, or bunny on a cardboard loom.
activities.whyItWorks: Engaging and creative activity suitable for a range of ages.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Walthamstow Central, then short walk.
transport.tip: Check the specific times on the website.

activities.title: Spitalfields City Farm
activities.description: A small city farm with animals like goats, sheep, and chickens.
activities.whyItWorks: Allows children to see and interact with farm animals without a large entry fee. Perfect for short attention spans.

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Shoreditch High Street, then short walk.
transport.tip: Check for special events on their website.

activities.title: Discover Children's Story Centre
activities.description: Immersive play spaces known as Story Worlds and a Story Garden playground. Baby Storytelling, crafts and singalong.
activities.whyItWorks: Designed for young children to explore stories through play.

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: Cinema Chill: Peace at Last
activities.description: Relaxed cinema experience showing 'Peace at Last'.
activities.whyItWorks: Calm cinema environment suitable for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: DLR to Limehouse, then short walk.
transport.tip: Check website for show times.

activities.title: Zoonormous Egg Hunt at London Zoo
activities.description: A special Easter egg hunt where kids search for hidden eggs and solve riddles.
activities.whyItWorks: Combines animal viewing with an engaging Easter activity.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Camden Town, then bus to London Zoo.
transport.tip: Book zoo tickets in advance.

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore dinosaurs, animals, and natural wonders.
activities.whyItWorks: Large, engaging exhibits that appeal to a wide range of ages. Plenty of space to move.

transport.tip: Visit during off-peak hours to avoid crowds.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Interactive exhibits on science, technology, and space.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on displays engage children and make learning fun.

transport.tip: Check website for special events and temporary exhibits.

activities.title: Battersea Park
activities.price: Free (some attractions within the park are paid)
activities.description: A large park with gardens, a boating lake, playgrounds, and a children's zoo (entry fee applies for the zoo).
activities.whyItWorks: Variety of activities for different interests, open space for running around.

transport.tip: Pack a picnic to enjoy by the lake.

activities.title: Cutty Sark Easter Egg Trail
activities.price: Included with entry to the ship
activities.description: Easter Egg Trail throughout the historic ship. Discover facts and unscramble a nautical code for a treat.
activities.whyItWorks: Combines history, exploration, and a fun Easter activity.

transport.tip: Suitable for young explorers, may be a bit advanced for a 3 year old, but still fun to see the ship

activities.title: Diana Memorial Playground
activities.description: Pirate ship themed playground in Kensington Gardens.
activities.whyItWorks: Toddlers can explore, climb, and use their imaginations.

transport.fromHackney: Central line to Notting Hill Gate
transport.tip: Can get crowded, arrive early.

activities.title: Tate Modern
activities.description: Explore modern and contemporary art with family activities and workshops.
activities.whyItWorks: Offers sensory experiences and creative inspiration, plus space to move around.

transport.fromHackney: Tube to Blackfriars then walk along the Southbank
transport.tip: Check for family workshops on the Tate Modern website.

activities.title: Southbank Centre
activities.description: A hub of arts, fun, and food with family concerts, creative workshops, and open spaces.
activities.whyItWorks: Welcoming and accessible with a variety of activities for all ages.

transport.tip: Check the Southbank Centre website for free events.

activities.title: Spring Family Fun
activities.price: Some paid activities and some free
activities.description: A festival of fun and creativity for families, including shows, music, puppetry, and free activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Variety of activities suitable for different ages and interests.

transport.tip: Check the Southbank Centre website for specific events and booking information.

activities.title: REPLAY: A Limitless Recycled Playground
activities.description: A play space made out of repurposed materials.
activities.whyItWorks: Unique and engaging play experience.

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance to guarantee entry.

activities.title: Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt at Hampton Court Palace
activities.description: Roam around the gardens and find hidden Lindt Gold Bunny statues to win a chocolate treat.
activities.whyItWorks: Combines outdoor exploration with a fun Easter-themed activity.

transport.tip: Book palace tickets in advance and allow plenty of time for travel.

activities.title: Baby Shark's Easter Splash
activities.description: An interactive immersive experience with an Easter Egg Hunt and Baby Shark characters.
activities.whyItWorks: Engaging and interactive experience with popular characters.

transport.tip: Show is a 20-minute looping journey.

activities.title: Kew Gardens – Octonauts Above and Beyond
activities.description: An interactive trail where young explorers complete challenges, discover facts and learn how to protect our planet.
activities.whyItWorks: Combines outdoor exploration with education.

transport.tip: Allow at least 3 hours.

activities.title: Easter Eggsplorers at Hobbledown Heath
activities.description: A full-scale Easter event with various activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Offers a variety of Easter-themed activities.

transport.fromHackney: Tube and train to Hounslow Heath, then bus.
transport.tip: Check website for event details and booking.

activities.title: A Midsummer Night's Dream
activities.description: A theatrical production of Shakespeare's A Midsummer Night's Dream.
activities.whyItWorks: Introduction to Shakespeare in an accessible way.

transport.tip: Suitable for older children, may be too long for a 3-year-old.

activities.title: The Lion Inside
activities.description: A theatrical production.
activities.whyItWorks: Aimed specifically at young children.

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance
